propositions: No standing instrumentation ties plan-review verdicts to downstream outcomes (reopens, force-closes, post-claim edits), leaving false-positive drift invisible until author trust erodes.

A re-runnable gate-eval job refreshes the outcome corpus by subprocess-invoking the miner and classifies each reviewed ticket into CAUGHT-BUT-IGNORED, UNKNOWABLE, MISSED, or N/A via a first-match cascade.
A classifier over sidecar findings alone reaches only 4/8 frozen cases, while adding outcome-corpus fields plus a strength predicate reaches 7/8, deliberately avoiding the overfitting 8/8 rule.
Per-criterion trailing metrics (blocking_fp_proxy, advisory_application_rate, rounds_per_ticket, sample_counts) are computed finding-level over a deduplicated multi-round finding union.
A documented playbook demotes a criterion from blocking to advisory when its trailing blocking_fp_proxy exceeds 10%, triggering human review with T5e as the demotion precedent.
The job introduces no gate or source behaviour change and validates degenerate/empty windows by exiting non-zero rather than emitting a trivial result.
